title: Vella Bambaram Lyrics Saguni Songs Lyrics in Thanglish English
stanzas:
Song:Vella Bambaram
Singers : Baba Sehgal, Priya Himesh
Movie : Saguni
Music : G.V.Prakash

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Vella pambaram mella suthudhudhe
Kalla paarvathaan kcanna kothudhe

Makku pombala, makku pombala
manasha robbery senjaale
Chikku chikku nu vandhu pesura
sirpam pola thaan kai kaalae

Valanju paakura,nelinju paakura
melaga kadicha naakaaga
Urundu nikura,therandu nikura
alava elacha thekkaaga

Yen maamave, ne mayakaathe
ada idhuthaan saakaaga

Nangu nangu nu nenju kuthura
renga raatina kannaale

vekkam vittu vaa pinnaale

nennu nennure nennu nennure

family man-ah enna maara vayendi

hey jaathagam kondu poi thedhi paakata
jolly-ah escape aavom vaaya....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vella Bambaram?

The song Vella Bambaram conveys a sense of joy and celebration, highlighting themes of fun and togetherness.

What is the context of this song in the movie Saguni?

In Saguni, the song is a lively number that showcases the characters enjoying a festive moment, adding to the film's overall upbeat tone.

Who are the singers and music director of Vella Bambaram?

The song is sung by Baba Sehgal and Priya Himesh, with music composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was Vella Bambaram released?

Vella Bambaram was released on June 4, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vella Bambaram, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song captures the essence of fun and camaraderie among friends, making it a perfect dance number for parties. With its upbeat tempo and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is a highlight in the movie Saguni, showcasing the characters' carefree spirit.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vella Bambaram from Saguni is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring the dynamic vocals of Baba Sehgal and Priya Himesh. With GV Prakash's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the perfect blend of energy and fun that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: The white balloon is floating slowly. The thief is watching carefully.
The girl is a bit crazy; she talks like a statue after a robbery.
It’s spinning and rolling, it’s like a big deal when it’s cut.
Oh my dear mother, don’t be so confused, this is just a joke.
My heart is beating fast at night because of you. I’m wandering around aimlessly after letting go of my worries.
I keep saying your name repeatedly.
When the flowers bloom, the fragrance spreads, and my heart races when you come.
I’ve already fallen in love, and I’ve come with a plan to win you over.
At night, uncle, I’ll be thinking of you, and in the morning, I’ll be dreaming of you.
I’m not the one who is not yours; your rooster will protect you...
I keep saying your name repeatedly.
I’ve grown a thick mustache, and I’m ready to be a mother-in-law.
I’ve grown a thorn in my side, and I’ve pushed it away; I’ve received a blessing, and I’m asking questions.
As a family man, I need to change; bachelor life is all about fun. Let’s escape with a good plan.
